response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014–2015) — far below the 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows the role requires. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain background. Recent work is full-stack TypeScript/Node.js with some DLang, which does not substitute for the mandatory C++ and financial-systems requirements.
strengths: Long, varied senior engineering career with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some adjacent fintech exposure at RIDE Capital (investment platform, though not in C++)
Comfortable with low-latency, high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) and dev-ops tooling
concerns: Effectively no production C++ experience on Windows — fails the core mandatory skill
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Investment/Capital Banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: Missing Fixed Income / Capital Markets domain
